task: Find the total monthly price for four prepaid unlimited lines without autopay discounts.
graderReasoning: The agent navigated to Verizon Prepaid phone plans and used the on-page line selector and Auto Pay toggle. The final snapshot shows 4 lines selected ('text: 4') and Auto Pay turned off ('text: Off'). On that state, the Verizon page displays the base 'Unlimited' plan at '$180/mo' for four lines. This directly supports the answer that four prepaid unlimited lines without autopay discounts cost $180/month.
final_result_response:
Four Verizon Prepaid **Unlimited** lines without Auto Pay discounts are **$180/month**.

That includes the multi-line discount, but excludes Auto Pay discounts. Taxes and fees may apply.
action_history: Opening Verizon prepaid page: const p1 = await openTab('https://www.verizon.com/');
Opening Verizon prepaid section: await page.locator('e59').click();
Opening prepaid plans menu: await page.locator('e22').click();
Opening prepaid phone plans: await page.locator('e31').click();
Setting four lines without Auto Pay: await page.locator('e34').click();
Setting four lines without Auto Pay: await page.locator('e32').click();
Setting four lines without Auto Pay: await page.locator('e32').click();
Setting four lines without Auto Pay: await page.locator('e32').click();
